task.en:
Open the Stickies app and create a new sticky note (File menu, New Note). In that note, type the following two lines exactly, on separate lines:

Garage code: 4417
Trash day: Thursday

Leave the note open so it is saved. Do not edit the existing welcome notes.

pre_command: killall Stickies 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Containers/com.apple.Stickies/Data/Library/Stickies"; for d in "$SDIR"/*.rtfd; do [ -e "$d/TXT.rtf" ] || continue; if grep -ql 'Garage code: 4417' "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null || grep -ql 'Trash day: Thursday' "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null; then rm -rf "$d"; fi; done
grading_command: killall Stickies 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Containers/com.apple.Stickies/Data/Library/Stickies"; found=0; for d in "$SDIR"/*.rtfd; do [ -e "$d/TXT.rtf" ] || continue; txt=$(textutil -convert txt -stdout "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null); case "$txt" in *"Garage code: 4417"*) found=$((found+1));; esac; done; [ "$found" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False

killall Stickies 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Containers/com.apple.Stickies/Data/Library/Stickies"; found=0; for d in "$SDIR"/*.rtfd; do [ -e "$d/TXT.rtf" ] || continue; txt=$(textutil -convert txt -stdout "$d/TXT.rtf" 2>/dev/null); case "$txt" in *"Garage code: 4417"*"Trash day: Thursday"*) found=$((found+1));; esac; done; [ "$found" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False
